panel.title: Libre Asist
greeting: Hi! I can help you with Calc and Writer. Select content and ask me for formulas, text, corrections, analysis, or changes.
error.busy: I'm already working on another request.
error.no_doc: Open a Calc or Writer document to use these actions.
error.no_selection: Select content or place the cursor first.
error.docked: Could not automatically position the window to the right.
error.discarded: Discarded the pending proposal and prepared a new one.
error.no_selection_ref: Your request mentions 'this' or 'that part', but no text is selected in Writer. Select the text you want to modify and ask again. If you want to add content at the end, say 'add at the end of the document'.
error.no_json: The model replied without a valid JSON block. Rephrase your request with a clear, specific instruction (for example: 'add a section X at the end' or 'change the greeting to Hello Laura'). Detail: {0}
error.format_no_selection: To apply formatting in Writer, select text first. If you want to write new text, say 'write...' or 'compose...'.
error.no_text_to_edit: No text found in the document to edit. I can create new text if you ask me to write or compose.
info.no_pending_apply: There is no pending proposal to apply.
info.rule_save_failed: Could not save the persistent rule to disk.
info.no_pending_confirm: There is no pending proposal to confirm.
info.wrong_doc_kind: The pending proposal is for {0}. Switch to that document or discard it.
info.no_pending_cancel: There is no pending proposal to cancel.
info.proposal_cancelled: Proposal discarded. The document was not modified.
info.no_changes_applied: No changes were applied. Check if there is a valid selection or ask me again.
info.empty_history: No actions have been applied in this session yet.
info.nothing_to_undo: There are no recent changes to undo.
info.undo_wrong_doc: The last change was in {0}. Switch to that document type to undo it.
info.undo_failed: Could not undo the last change.
suggestions.writer.selection.review: Review this selection without modifying it
suggestions.writer.selection.clarity: Make it clearer and more professional
suggestions.writer.selection.format: Apply modern formatting to the selected text
suggestions.writer.empty.letter: Write a simple letter in a modern style
suggestions.writer.content.improve: Improve the clarity and tone of the document
suggestions.writer.content.format: Apply professional formatting to the document
suggestions.calc.single.budget: Create a budget table starting from this cell
suggestions.calc.single.structure: Generate a simple structure with headers and totals
suggestions.calc.formulas.review: Review the formulas in this selection
suggestions.calc.formulas.risks: Detect errors or risks in the table
suggestions.calc.formulas.format: Format this table with highlighted headers
suggestions.calc.bank.match: Mark matches and pending review items
suggestions.calc.bank.duplicates: Look for duplicates or repeated amounts
suggestions.calc.headers.analyze: Analyze this table and detect issues
suggestions.calc.headers.issues: Look for duplicates or missing data
suggestions.calc.generic.clean: Clean up spaces, dates, and numbers stored as text
ref.title: REFERENCE 'title' detected in request: '{0}'.
ref.paragraph_out_of_range: ': the document only has {0} paragraphs. Please use a valid number.
ref.below_this: REFERENCE 'below this': no explicit selection, interpreted as append at end of document (action append_text).
ref.header:
REFERENCES DETECTED IN THE REQUEST (use these exact texts as anchor):
- {0}
prompt.system_role: You are Libre Asist, specialist in LibreOffice {0}.
actions.error.not_json: The proposal must be a JSON object.
actions.error.no_changes: The proposal has no changes to apply.
actions.error.invalid_formula: Invalid formula in {0}: must start with =.
actions.error.change_no_value: Change without value or format for {0}
actions.error.writer_no_text: The Writer action has no text.
actions.error.writer_no_replacements: The Writer action has no replacements.
actions.error.writer_no_find: Writer replacement has no search text.
actions.error.writer_no_useful_replaceme: The Writer action has no useful replacements.
actions.error.no_json_block: No JSON block found in the response.
actions.error.invalid_json: The AI returned invalid JSON. Retrying with strict format if the action allows. Detail: {0}
actions.error.comment_no_useful: Writer comment has no useful content.
actions.error.format_no_changes: The format action has no changes.
ai.error.no_url: API URL not configured. Open Config.
preview.scope_replace_doc: Scope: replaces the current Writer document content.
preview.scope_format_doc: Scope: applies structural formatting to the current Writer document.
preview.accept_redlines: Accept all pending changes in the document.
preview.reject_redlines: Reject all pending changes in the document.
prompt.retry.writer_creation: RESPOND ONLY WITH VALID JSON in a ```json block. The document is empty. Use action insert_text with blocks, summary, style and page_style. Do not write explanations outside the JSON.
prompt.retry.writer_action: IMPORTANT: Respond ONLY with a valid JSON block. If the user asks to add content at the end of the document, use action append_text with text or blocks. If they ask to modify existing text, use replace_text or replace_document. Do NOT write explanations, do NOT use markdown outside the block, do NOT include notes.
prompt.retry.calc_action:
You are a LibreOffice Calc formula expert. Respond ONLY with a valid JSON block containing summary and changes. Each change must have a cell and at least value or format. If the request is ambiguous, still return a concrete change. Do NOT write explanations.

User request: {0}
prompt.retry.calc_creation: RESPOND ONLY WITH VALID JSON in a ```json block. Do not write explanations outside the JSON. Only use cells within generated_allowed_cells. Each change must have a cell and at least value or format. Do not use trailing commas or unclosed strings.
template.email.title: Create an editable formal email
template.letter.title: Create an editable formal letter
template.append.title: Add a new block at the end of the document (editable)
template.append.text: [New requested block - replace with your real content]
